texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Meal Plan Details
texts.text: Meal Plan Details

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner: from rich buffets in Horizon buffet restaurant Halfboard: includes breakfast and lunch or dinner plus afternoon tea
texts.text: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner: from rich buffets in Horizon buffet restaurant Halfboard: includes breakfast and lunch or dinner plus afternoon tea

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: All-Inclusive Details
texts.text: All-Inclusive Details

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: In addition to FULLBOARD services, the following additional services are provided:
texts.text: In addition to FULLBOARD services, the following additional services are provided:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All local soft drinks, soda water, local still water, sparkling water, local bottled beer (Tusker, Pilsner, Balozi), South African house wines (red and white) at restaurants and bars. New: afternoon snack menu at the Pool Bistro/Pizzeria from 13h00-18h00.
texts.text: All local soft drinks, soda water, local still water, sparkling water, local bottled beer (Tusker, Pilsner, Balozi), South African house wines (red and white) at restaurants and bars. New: afternoon snack menu at the Pool Bistro/Pizzeria from 13h00-18h00.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Local brands of spirits for drinks and cocktails at the bars (10h00 - 23h00). Daily filling of the minibar with soft drinks and beer
texts.text: Local brands of spirits for drinks and cocktails at the bars (10h00 - 23h00). Daily filling of the minibar with soft drinks and beer

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Per every 7 nights of stay: 1 á la carte dinner in restaurants Chui Grill or Lemongrass included (Lobster & Prawns are excluded)
texts.text: Per every 7 nights of stay: 1 á la carte dinner in restaurants Chui Grill or Lemongrass included (Lobster & Prawns are excluded)

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Further Specials
texts.text: Further Specials

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Honeymoon Special (within 12 months) min. stay 7 nights upgrade on arrival: SUP to DLX, DLX  to CHUI, CHUI to Honeymoon Suite
texts.text: Honeymoon Special (within 12 months) min. stay 7 nights upgrade on arrival: SUP to DLX, DLX  to CHUI, CHUI to Honeymoon Suite

texts.text: > on the basis of an immediate SELL & REPORT;

texts.text: > until a stop sales must be installed by the hotel. In case of STOP SALES we allow 24 hours notification deadline for any missing bookings.

texts.orig: In order to use this system, please send your STOP SALE-email address to Reservations@leopardbeachresort.com
